items.title: Update FontAwesome to Latest Version in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This PR updates the @fortawesome/fontawesome-svg-core package from version 6.7.2 to 7.2.0. The new version includes various improvements and changes, enhancing the overall icon library experience. Key modifications in the release notes include simplifications in icon request titles and templates.

items.title: Remove SKALE from Discovery Resources in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the 'skale' entry from the `/discovery/resources` endpoint to prevent resource sync failures. The change ensures that only valid network tokens are emitted, allowing for smoother integration with x402scan. SKALE support remains intact in other areas of the platform, ensuring continued functionality for SKALE payments.

items.title: Enhance MongoDB Archiving with New Scripts in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new directory for MongoDB archiving scripts, making them portable and easier to use across different workstations. Key additions include a day-by-day export script, a resilient launcher for handling errors, and improved environment variable management. These changes enhance the reliability and usability of the archiving process.

items.title: New Discovery Endpoint for x402 Crawlers in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new endpoint, `GET /discovery/resources`, which allows x402scan crawlers to automatically enumerate AceDataCloud's paid APIs. The implementation includes a 308 redirect from `/list` and ensures that resource URLs are pulled from the PlatformBackend, maintaining it as the single source of truth. Additionally, new environment variables for payment addresses have been added to the deployment configuration.

items.title: Enhance Revenue Analysis with Granularity Selector in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a Granularity dropdown to the Revenue Analysis chart, allowing users to select between Daily, Weekly, and Monthly views. The new feature improves data visibility over extended date ranges by adjusting the granularity of the displayed revenue trend. Additionally, internationalization support has been added for multiple languages, ensuring a broader accessibility.

items.title: New Monthly Revenue Bar Chart Added in Roadmap 📊
items.summary: This update introduces a new monthly revenue bar chart to the public Roadmap page, displaying revenue data from January 2026 onwards. The chart features an inline SVG design with tooltips and summary statistics, enhancing the visibility of revenue trends. A new script has been added to generate the revenue data, ensuring it aligns with existing data pipelines.

items.title: Enhance Revenue Trend Analysis with Flexible Granularity in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `granularity` query parameter to the revenue trend API, allowing users to view revenue data aggregated by day, week, or month. The change enhances readability for longer time spans while maintaining backward compatibility. The frontend will also be updated to include a dropdown for selecting the granularity option.

items.title: Updated Buyback Transactions in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update adds five new on-chain buyback transactions to the buyback history, enhancing transparency and verifiability. The revenue split has been adjusted from 5% to 10%, with a notable increase in the buyback allocation. All transactions are validated against the existing schema to ensure data integrity.

items.title: Update vue-i18n to 11.4.4 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the vue-i18n library from version 11.4.0 to 11.4.4. Key improvements include enhanced security measures for JavaScript URL sanitization and the dropping of Node.js 20 support. These changes aim to improve the overall stability and security of the application.

items.title: Upgrade ESLint to Version 10.4.1 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps ESLint from version 9.39.4 to 10.4.1, introducing several bug fixes and documentation improvements. Key changes include fixes for autofix behavior and updates to deprecated rules, enhancing overall code quality and maintainability.

items.title: Standardize VS Code Plugin Flow for MCP Articles in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update standardizes the onboarding flow for VS Code MCP promotion articles in Chinese, ensuring a consistent and user-friendly experience. Key changes include the removal of internal jargon, clear documentation of API Key sources, and updated command instructions that align with marketplace packages. These improvements enhance clarity and usability for developers integrating Ace Data Cloud services.

items.title: Update dayjs to latest version in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the dayjs library from version 1.11.20 to 1.11.21. Key improvements include bug fixes that preserve unsupported year tokens in formatting, enhancing the library's reliability. The changes are reflected in both package.json and package-lock.json files.

items.title: Dependency Updates for Python Packages in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the `tencentcloud-sdk-python` from version 3.1.92 to 3.1.105 and upgrades `python-frontmatter` from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0. Notably, the new version of `python-frontmatter` drops support for Python 3.9 and addresses type issues, enhancing compatibility with newer Python versions.
